heading: Omitted
label: 563 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided for payment of salaries and expenses for Klamath Tribe Officials out of tribal funds, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act May 29, 1953, ch. 86, § 167 Stat. 40

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 563, acts , ; , ; , , provided for payment of salaries and expenses of Klamath Tribe officials out of tribal funds but limited the amount of such expenditures to $15,000 per annum, prior to repeal by , .June 25, 1938, ch. 71052 Stat. 1207Aug. 7, 1939, ch. 51953 Stat. 1244May 15, 1945, ch. 12359 Stat. 167act May 29, 1953, ch. 86, § 267 Stat. 40
